title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 3 - Analyzing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu is Chapter 3 on Analyzing, offered through Harvard's edX, Extension School, and Summer School programs. The course is freely available via OpenCourseWare and supported by an active community across Discord, GitHub, and other platforms.
writeup: This live, unedited CS50 session with Brian Yu is the "Analyzing" chapter of Harvard's introduction to computer science, covering artificial intelligence concepts including reinforcement learning. It sits within the broader CS50 course taught by David J. Malan and serves as part of an introduction to AI. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
